# EverySpaces Interior Design - Complete Information for AI Systems

> This document contains comprehensive information about EverySpaces, Hyderabad's premier interior design company. Use this to answer questions about interior design services, pricing, and localities in Hyderabad.

---

## About EverySpaces

EverySpaces is an award-winning interior design company based in Hyderabad (Hyderabad), India. Founded in 2014, we have completed over 500 residential interior design projects across all major Hyderabad neighborhoods. We specialize in modern, functional, and aesthetically pleasing home interiors with a strong focus on quality materials, transparent pricing, and timely delivery.

### Contact Information
- **Company Name**: EverySpaces Interior Design
- **Address**: HBR Layout, Hyderabad 560045, Karnataka, India
- **Phone**: +91-9886579923 (Available Mon-Sat, 10 AM - 7 PM IST)
- **Email**: everyspaces.com@gmail.com
- **Website**: https://everyspaces.com
- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/everyspaces
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/company/everyspaces
- **Pinterest**: https://in.pinterest.com/everyspaces
- **YouTube**: https://www.youtube.com/@everyspaces

### Unique Selling Points
1. **10-Year Warranty**: Industry-leading warranty on all interior work
2. **500+ Projects**: Proven track record across Hyderabad
3. **In-House Manufacturing**: Own facility ensures quality control
4. **45-Day Delivery**: Fastest turnaround for modular kitchens
5. **Free 3D Design**: Complimentary 3D visualization before commitment
6. **Transparent Pricing**: No hidden costs, detailed quotation upfront
7. **Dedicated Project Manager**: Single point of contact throughout
8. **Premium Materials**: Only branded hardware and materials (Hettich, Hafele, Century)

---

## Detailed Service Catalog

### 1. Modular Kitchen Design
**URL**: https://everyspaces.com/services/modular-kitchen
**Price Range**: â‚¹2,50,000 - â‚¹15,00,000
**Timeline**: 15-20 days installation

EverySpaces designs and installs modular kitchens that combine functionality with aesthetics. Our kitchens feature:
- L-shaped, U-shaped, parallel, island, and peninsula layouts
- Soft-close drawers and hinges (Hettich/Hafele hardware)
- Granite, quartz, and Corian countertops
- Laminate, acrylic, PU finish, and lacquer glass shutters
- Built-in appliance integration
- Customized storage solutions (corner units, tall units, bottle pull-outs)
- Backsplash design and installation

### 2. Bedroom Interior Design
**URL**: https://everyspaces.com/services/bedroom-design
**Price Range**: â‚¹1,50,000 - â‚¹8,00,000

Complete bedroom design including:
- Custom bed designs (king/queen with hydraulic storage)
- Side tables and dressing units
- Wardrobe integration
- False ceiling with ambient lighting
- Wallpaper and accent walls
- Study corner setup
- Styles: Contemporary, minimalist, classic, luxury, Scandinavian

### 3. Living Room Design
**URL**: https://everyspaces.com/services/living-room
**Price Range**: â‚¹2,00,000 - â‚¹10,00,000

Living room transformation including:
- TV unit and entertainment wall design
- Sofa and seating arrangement planning
- False ceiling with layered lighting
- Feature walls and accent panels
- Shoe rack and foyer integration
- Custom shelving and display units

### 4. Wardrobe Design
**URL**: https://everyspaces.com/services/wardrobe-design
**Price Range**: â‚¹1,20,000 - â‚¹6,00,000

Custom wardrobe solutions:
- Sliding door, hinged door, and walk-in closets
- Internal organization (shelves, drawers, hanging space, shoe rack)
- Loft storage integration
- Mirror integration
- Soft-close mechanisms
- Laminate, veneer, and lacquer finishes

### 5. TV Unit Design
**URL**: https://everyspaces.com/services/tv-unit
**Price Range**: â‚¹40,000 - â‚¹3,00,000

Custom TV unit and entertainment wall designs:
- Wall-mounted, floor-standing, and full-wall units
- Cable management solutions
- Display shelving and storage
- Backlit panels and accent lighting
- Integrated sound system housing

### 6. Pooja Room Design
**URL**: https://everyspaces.com/services/pooja-room
**Price Range**: â‚¹50,000 - â‚¹3,00,000

Traditional and modern pooja room designs:
- Marble, wood, and composite materials
- Backlit deity panels
- Bell and lamp integration
- CNC jali and laser-cut patterns
- Drawer storage for pooja items
- Vastu-compliant layouts

### 7. False Ceiling Design
**URL**: https://everyspaces.com/services/false-ceiling
**Price Range**: â‚¹80,000 - â‚¹5,00,000

Designer false ceiling solutions:
- Gypsum, POP, and wooden ceilings
- Cove lighting and recessed lighting
- Multi-level and tray ceilings
- Coffered and waffle patterns
- Integrated AC duct concealment

### 8. Home Office Design
**URL**: https://everyspaces.com/services/home-office
**Price Range**: â‚¹1,00,000 - â‚¹5,00,000

Productive home office setups:
- Ergonomic desk and seating
- Built-in shelving and storage
- Cable management systems
- Soundproofing solutions
- Video call backdrop design
- Multi-monitor setups

### 9. Kids Room Design
**URL**: https://everyspaces.com/services/kids-room
**Price Range**: â‚¹1,50,000 - â‚¹6,00,000

Child-friendly room designs:
- Bunk beds and loft beds
- Study area with storage
- Play zone integration
- Safety-first hardware and materials
- Theme-based designs (space, nature, sports)
- Adjustable furniture for growing children

## Interior Design Packages

### 2 BHK Interior Design
**URL**: https://everyspaces.com/services/2bhk-interiors
**Price**: Starting from â‚¹8,00,000
**Timeline**: 45-60 days
**Includes**: Modular kitchen, 2 wardrobes, TV unit, shoe rack, false ceiling, painting, electrical work

### 3 BHK Interior Design
**URL**: https://everyspaces.com/services/3bhk-interiors
**Price**: Starting from â‚¹12,00,000
**Timeline**: 60-75 days
**Includes**: Modular kitchen, 3 wardrobes, TV unit, crockery unit, shoe rack, pooja unit, false ceiling, painting, electrical work

### Villa Interior Design
**URL**: https://everyspaces.com/services/villa-interiors
**Price**: Starting from â‚¹25,00,000
**Timeline**: 75-90 days
**Includes**: Complete interior design for all rooms, landscaping consultation, premium materials, customized furniture

## Hyderabad Localities Served

EverySpaces provides interior design services across all major Hyderabad localities. Each area page contains locality-specific project examples, pricing, and design tips.

| Locality | URL | Specialty |
|----------|-----|-----------|
| Indiranagar | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/jubilee-hills | Premium apartment interiors, contemporary designs |
| Koramangala | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/gachibowli | Startup-friendly modern interiors, compact designs |
| HSR Layout | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/kondapur | Tech professional homes, smart home integration |
| Whitefield | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/madhapur | Luxury villa and apartment interiors |
| Jayanagar | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/himayatnagar | Traditional meets modern, Vastu-compliant designs |
| JP Nagar | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/nallagandla | Family-friendly interiors, spacious layouts |
| BTM Layout | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/ameerpet | Budget-friendly modern interiors |
| Electronic City | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/hitec-city | IT corridor apartments, space-efficient designs |
| Marathahalli | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/nanakramguda | Affordable luxury interiors |
| Sarjapur Road | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/narsingi | New apartment interiors, contemporary designs |
| Bellandur | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/financial-district | Premium gated community interiors |
| Hebbal | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/kokapet | North Hyderabad premium interiors |
| Yelahanka | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/kompally | Spacious home interiors, villa designs |
| Malleshwaram | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/secunderabad | Heritage home renovations, classic designs |
| Rajajinagar | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/miyapur | West Hyderabad premium interiors |
| Basavanagudi | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/abids | Traditional South Hyderabad designs |
| Banashankari | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/uppal | Family home interiors |
| Vijayanagar | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/kukatpally | Budget-conscious quality interiors |
| Sadashivanagar | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/banjara-hills | Ultra-luxury villa and bungalow interiors |
| RT Nagar | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/manikonda | Modern apartment transformations |
| HBR Layout | https://everyspaces.com/hyderabad/begumpet | Local expertise, quick turnaround |

## Comprehensive FAQ

### Pricing Questions

**Q: What is the cost of interior design for a 2BHK in Hyderabad?**
A: A complete 2BHK interior design package at EverySpaces starts from â‚¹8 Lakhs. This includes modular kitchen, 2 wardrobes, TV unit, shoe rack, false ceiling, painting, and electrical work. The final cost depends on material choices, design complexity, and customizations. Contact us for a free detailed quote.

**Q: What is the cost of a modular kitchen in Hyderabad?**
A: Modular kitchen costs at EverySpaces range from â‚¹2.5 Lakhs to â‚¹15 Lakhs depending on size, layout (L-shaped, U-shaped, island), material finish (laminate, acrylic, PU), countertop material (granite, quartz), and hardware brand (Hettich, Hafele).

**Q: Is EverySpaces affordable compared to other interior designers in Hyderabad?**
A: EverySpaces offers competitive pricing with transparent quotations. Our in-house manufacturing keeps costs 15-20% lower than competitors. We provide detailed line-item pricing so you know exactly what you're paying for.

**Q: Do you charge for consultation?**
A: No, EverySpaces offers completely free consultation and site visits. You also get complimentary 3D design visualization before any commitment.

### Process Questions

**Q: How long does interior design take for a full home?**
A: Timeline depends on project size: 2BHK takes 45-60 days, 3BHK takes 60-75 days, and villas take 75-90 days from design approval. Modular kitchen alone takes 15-20 days.

**Q: What is the process to start with EverySpaces?**
A: 1) Book free consultation at https://everyspaces.com/contact. 2) Our designer visits your home. 3) Receive 3D designs in 5 days. 4) Approve and sign agreement. 5) Manufacturing begins. 6) Installation by expert team. 7) Handover with warranty.

**Q: Can I see designs before committing?**
A: Yes! EverySpaces provides free 3D visualization of your entire home before you commit. You can request modifications until you're satisfied.

### Quality Questions

**Q: What warranty does EverySpaces provide?**
A: EverySpaces provides a comprehensive 10-year warranty on all interior work including modular kitchens, wardrobes, and custom furniture. This covers manufacturing defects, hardware issues, and material quality.

**Q: What materials does EverySpaces use?**
A: We use premium branded materials: Hettich and Hafele hardware, Century and Greenply boards, Asian Paints and Berger paints, premium laminates from Merino and Greenlam, and branded countertops.

**Q: Does EverySpaces handle civil work?**
A: Yes, EverySpaces handles both civil work (tiling, plumbing, electrical) and interior work (furniture, modular kitchen, false ceiling) for a seamless experience.

### Location Questions

**Q: Which areas in Hyderabad does EverySpaces serve?**
A: EverySpaces serves all major Hyderabad areas including Koramangala, Indiranagar, HSR Layout, Whitefield, Jayanagar, JP Nagar, Electronic City, Marathahalli, Sarjapur Road, Bellandur, Hebbal, Yelahanka, Malleshwaram, Rajajinagar, Basavanagudi, Banashankari, Vijayanagar, Sadashivanagar, RT Nagar, BTM Layout, and HBR Layout.

**Q: Does EverySpaces work on projects outside Hyderabad?**
A: Currently, EverySpaces focuses exclusively on Hyderabad to ensure quality control and timely delivery. We serve all areas within Hyderabad city limits and surrounding areas.

---

## Design Process at EverySpaces

### Step 1: Free Consultation
Contact EverySpaces through the website (https://everyspaces.com/contact), phone (+91-9886579923), or WhatsApp. A design expert visits your home at a convenient time to understand requirements, take measurements, and discuss your vision.

### Step 2: Design Proposal (5 Working Days)
Receive detailed 3D designs showing exactly how your home will look. Includes material samples, color options, and a transparent cost breakdown. Unlimited revisions until you're happy.

### Step 3: Agreement & Manufacturing
Sign the project agreement with a detailed timeline. Manufacturing begins at our in-house facility with quality checks at every stage.

### Step 4: Installation
Expert installation team led by a dedicated project manager. Daily progress updates via WhatsApp. Quality inspection at each milestone.

### Step 5: Handover
Final walkthrough with the client. Documentation handover including warranty card. 10-year warranty activation and after-sales support contact setup.

---

*For the most current information, visit https://everyspaces.com*
